name: ADHICS_GOV
description: Controls covering healthcare cybersecurity policy, CISO leadership, and risk management framework requirements.

name: ADHICS_PHI
description: Controls covering PHI encryption at rest and in transit, access controls, data masking, and audit logging for protected health information.

name: ADHICS_IAM
description: Controls covering healthcare user authentication with MFA, privileged access for clinical systems, patient identity verification, and clinician credential management.

name: ADHICS_NET
description: Controls covering clinical network segmentation, medical device network isolation, healthcare API security, and telehealth platform security.

name: ADHICS_APP
description: Controls covering EHR system security, clinical application hardening, medical imaging (PACS/DICOM) security, and laboratory information system security.

name: ADHICS_DEV
description: Controls covering medical device inventory management, patch management with vendor coordination, device security monitoring, and device incident response.

name: ADHICS_DATA
description: Controls covering healthcare data classification, clinical data retention, research data de-identification, and healthcare data backup and recovery.

name: ADHICS_COMP
description: Controls covering HIPAA compliance, healthcare audit logging, breach notification procedures, and patient privacy rights management.

name: ADHICS_BC
description: Controls covering clinical system high availability, emergency access procedures, disaster recovery testing, and clinical system failover capabilities.
